style: bold graphic illustration, vibrant colors, clean vector look, screen-print or DTF-ready, modern streetwear / vintage retro / minimalist typography aesthetic, centered chest placement, flat design suitable for fabric printing
targetAudience: young adults and gift buyers shopping for unique apparel, niche fandom communities, hobby/lifestyle micro-niches (gym, gaming, music, pets, parents), birthday and holiday gift seekers, US/UK/EU Etsy apparel buyers
priceHint: $18-$36 depending on size and shirt style
designPromptExtra: Design a print-ready graphic for a t-shirt chest placement. Bold flat colors, sharp edges, no gradients unless minimal, suitable for DTF or screen-print fabric printing. Transparent or solid background. No mockup, no shirt — just the artwork. Vector-style or high-res raster, square or vertical aspect, centered composition. No fabric texture, no garment context.
descriptionVoice: playful, casual, friendly; emphasize fabric quality (Bella Canvas / Comfort Colors), unisex fit, soft hand-feel, durable print, sizing guide, gift-worthy presentation; never reference wall decor, frames, glass, or wood products
scenePool: young person wearing the t-shirt, casual lifestyle, neutral urban background, natural daylight
